title: Attach an MCP Server
lede: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server bundles external tools and resources your Smart Agent can use during a conversation. Attach one from the agent's Tools / MCP panel.

steps.title: Open the Tools / MCP Panel
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open the agent you want to extend.
  2. Open the Tools / MCP panel in the editor.
  3. Find the MCP Server selector.

images.caption: The Tools / MCP panel, where you pick an MCP server for the agent.
The Tools / MCP panel, where you pick an MCP server for the agent.

steps.title: Select an MCP Server
steps.content:
1. Open the MCP Server dropdown to see the servers set up for your account.
  2. Pick one - selecting it automatically enables MCP for this agent and saves the choice.
  3. To turn it off, clear the selection.

steps.title: Don't See Any Servers?
steps.content:
1. If the list is empty, you first need to set up an MCP server for your account.
  2. Use the Setup MCP link in the panel, then come back and select it here.

steps.title: Test the Agent
steps.content:
1. Open Test Agent and connect.
  2. Ask something that should use an MCP tool and confirm the agent can access it.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
